list.name: video_title
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT video_title FROM player_events ORDER BY video_title
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT video_title FROM player_events ORDER BY video_title
list.label: Vídeo

list.name: username
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT username FROM player_events ORDER BY username
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT username FROM player_events ORDER BY username
list.label: Aluno

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'complete' THEN session_id END)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT session_id), 0), 1) AS taxa_abandono FROM player_events WHERE ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title')

SELECT IFNULL(CAST(playback_rate AS TEXT) || 'x', '1.0x') as velocidade, COUNT(*) as volume_uso FROM player_events WHERE event = 'timeupdate' AND ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') GROUP BY velocidade ORDER BY volume_uso DESC;
SELECT error_code, COUNT(*) as total FROM player_events WHERE event = 'error' AND ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') GROUP BY error_code ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT printf('%02d:%02d', CAST(bucket/60 AS INTEGER), CAST(bucket%60 AS INTEGER)) as posicao, COUNT(*) as abandonos FROM (SELECT session_id, ROUND(MAX(current_time)/10)*10 as bucket, SUM(CASE WHEN event = 'complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completou FROM player_events WHERE ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') GROUP BY session_id) t WHERE completou = 0 GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
SELECT DATE(timestamp) as dia, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) as sessoes FROM player_events WHERE ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') GROUP BY dia ORDER BY dia

SELECT ROUND(current_time / 10) * 10 AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS value FROM player_events WHERE event = 'pause' AND ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') AND ('$username' = '*' OR username = '$username') GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT ROUND(to_time / 10) * 10 AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS value FROM player_events WHERE event = 'seek' AND from_time > to_time AND ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') AND ('$username' = '*' OR username = '$username') GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT COUNT(*) as buffering_eventos FROM player_events WHERE event IN ('buffer', 'buffering_start') AND ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') AND ('$username' = '*' OR username = '$username')

SELECT DATE(timestamp) as dia, (COUNT(*) * 5.0) / 60.0 AS minutos_assistidos FROM player_events WHERE event = 'timeupdate' AND ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') AND ('$username' = '*' OR username = '$username') GROUP BY dia ORDER BY dia

SELECT DATE(timestamp) as dia, COUNT(*) as pausas FROM player_events WHERE event = 'pause' AND ('$video_title' = '*' OR video_title = '$video_title') AND ('$username' = '*' OR username = '$username') GROUP BY dia ORDER BY dia
